item.title: They’re eating the dog? Satire of the hater mentality
item.description: They’re not eating the dogs or the cats. They’re here legally. Yet trump spreads lies and perpetuates hatred of LEGAL IMMIGRANTS from Haiti. This lady shows us the mentality of a lot of the haters. Register to vote and/or check the status of your voter registration by going here: IWillVote.com or to vote.gov . If you make use of mail-in voting, check trackvote.org to find out if your state offers a ballot tracking service. If your state permits early voting, consider taking advantage of that privilege! Certain states continue to “accidentally” purge legally registered voters from their rolls, so check to make sure you haven’t been purged. Be sure to vote in every election, including the “small” ones. The “big” politicians often got their start by winning the small elections. You can help weed out the bad ones early. #vote
item.dc:creator: SisterMidnight

item.title: Beat raise is swapping companies
item.description: Maybe americas not so bad ja Dievs ir īsts, tā ir patiesība, ka viņš mīl. Es to zinu, jo, neskatoties uz visām pasaules ciešanām, viņš svētīja pasauli kopā ar jums. un tu esi mīlēts, un tu esi kaut ko vērts, un es tevi mīlu!

item.dc:creator: SkyPigeon123

item.title: A single mother who died after delays in abortion-related care post-Roe. Her name was Amber Thurman.
item.description: She miscarried but needed medical attention to deal with the aftermath, but the procedure that would have saved her life somehow counted as an "abortion". For over 19 hours she suffered in pain at the hospital, waiting for doctors to intervene. When they finally did, it was too late and she didn't make it. She was accepted to nursing school days later. She should be preparing for school, she should still be with us. Apparently, her son is now afraid of the doctor. Poor lady, poor baby, poor broken-hearted family. https://www.huffpost.com/entry/mother-amber-thurman-georgia-abortion-ban_n_670eaacde4b0c5b8c0af991a
item.dc:creator: ChemistryAndPhysicsAreFun

item.title: Thursday UNHINGED meme dump to help you get to the end of weekend #519
item.description:
1
2. When a girl touches my...
3
4. Going all in
5. Too true
6. What alternative can we use here?
7. "hey, do you wanna play brick?"
8. Hungry? yeah? Let's go
9. A standard day in Russia
10
11. Friendship with trust broken
12
13
14. "Call the fishes to war!"
15. Hopefully this video will take the bad vibes away! P.S. If you like the humor of this dump, please consider wishlisting my wacky Stanley Parable-inspired game on Steam. I think it might be for your: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/

item.title: Small World
item.description:
The human eye looks like a black hole by Suren Manvelyan
Matchstick igniting by the friction surface of the box by Ole Bielfeldt Technique: Brightfield, Image Stacking Magnification: 2.5x
Taenia solium (tapeworm) everted scolex by Teresa Zgoda Technique: Confocal Magnification: 200x
Fluorescent turtle embryo by Teresa Zgoda Teresa Kugler Technique: Stereomicroscopy, Fluorescence Magnification: 5x
Butterfly egg by Ye Fei Zhang Technique: Image Stacking Magnification: 10X
Butterfly proboscis by Jochen Schroeder Technique: Image Stacking Magnification: 6.3x
Venomous fangs of a small tarantula by John-Oliver Dum Technique: Image Stacking Magnification: 10x
Crystallized sugar syrup by Diego García Technique: Polarized Light Magnification: 25x
Unburned particles of carbon released when the hydrocarbon chain of candle wax breaks down by Ole Bielfeldt Technique: Brightfield, Image Stacking Magnification: 2.5x
Ant by Eugenijus Kavaliauskas Technique: Reflected Light Magnification: 5x
item.dc:creator: Nofakepotatoes

item.title: I Want to Believe
item.description: These daily comics are really just a long-winded thank you. Because without you, the reader, all this effort would be just so much noise in the void. Extra gratitude goes to our patrons, the steadfast few who keep us grounded. If you’d like to join our community and support the cause, here’s your doorway: https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: "That's one small step for man, one Great Leap Forward for mankind."
item.dc:creator: BlooPhyre

item.title: Almost bedtime .. feel the anxiety of "not sleep" yet?
item.description: https://jakelikesonions.com/ I hope you smile or crack a mental smirk at some point today, from this or an unrelated thing - even if only a brief moment. Cheers!! ------------------------------------------------- FP Edit::: As with all humor, some people can't take it. In this case because sleep issues can be serious. I know because I have bad sleep. Just wanted to say humor is a good thing. If you need sleep help, get a study done or see a specialist. In the meantime, turn off devices, darkest room possible, cool or cold room, no alcohol 4 hours before bed, weighed blanket, no caffeine 6 hours before. These and more are all study-proven solutions called "sleep hygiene". You can find several sources online and one or more may be needed to get you closer to a good sleep. Even if you don't get perfection from trying, things can improve. Good luck!
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.dc:creator: razalude

item.title: HA HA - Phil Ken Sebben Cosplay
item.description:
Fun look at my Phil Ken Sebben Cosplay from the "Droopy Botox" episode. I rewatch the Harvey Birdman serious about once a year :P Also, most valuable lesson learned on this cosplay... Use proper paint that doesn't melt against your skin, or your blue necklace leaves it's shadow behind on you for about a week after you take it off - and everyone at work is too confused to ask questions....
Reference image
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: This woman built a shelter for cats in winter
item.dc:creator: GloryArse

item.title: Christina Applegate, pictured in 1990.
item.description: After a double mastectomy and diagnoses of multiple sclerosis, she stated in 2023 that she will no longer appear in front of a camera but is open to doing voice work. I wish her well
item.dc:creator: Nuraalek
